name: anchorfact
description: Machine-readable verified claims for LLM citations.

scripts.pages:build: npm run quality && npm run build
scripts.pipeline: npm run verify && npm run quality && npm run build
scripts.test: node tests/confidence.test.js && node tests/article-quality.test.js && node tests/build-metadata.test.js && node tests/provenance-signature.test.js && node tests/provenance-verify.test.js && node tests/production-integrity.test.js && node tests/cloudflare-usage-report.test.js && node tests/ai-evals-runner.test.js && node tests/ai-usefulness-benchmark.test.js && node tests/api-performance.test.js && node tests/citation-export.test.js && node tests/api-index.test.js && node tests/context-api.test.js && node tests/search-api.test.js && node tests/plan-api.test.js && node tests/evidence-api.test.js && node tests/article-api.test.js && node tests/claim-api.test.js && node tests/cite-api.test.js && node tests/source-api.test.js && node tests/resolve-api.test.js && node tests/functions-assets.test.js && node tests/topics-index.test.js && node tests/capabilities-index.test.js && node tests/coverage-index.test.js && node tests/project-readiness.test.js && node tests/content-health-index.test.js && node tests/examples-index.test.js && node tests/evals-index.test.js && node tests/graph-index.test.js && node tests/mcp-profile.test.js && node tests/mcp-local-check.test.js && node tests/compile.test.js && node tests/integration.test.js && node tests/mcp-index.test.js && node tests/public-audit.test.js && node tests/content-health-report.test.js && node tests/quality-gate.test.js && node tests/repo-hygiene.test.js && node tests/verification-cache.test.js && npm run repo:hygiene
scripts.deploy: npm run pages:build && wrangler pages deploy dist

author: AnchorFact Contributors
